caption: The video appears to be a presentation slide discussing the importance of ensuring transparency in an organization or project. The slide is titled "Ensure transparency" and features an image of two hands with the word "TRUST" written on them, symbolizing the need for trust through transparency. Below the title, there is a section labeled "Communicate," which lists four key strategies: "Consider joint board appointment," "Report back regularly," "Promote efforts," and "Use webpage and social media." These points suggest methods for maintaining open communication and fostering trust among stakeholders. The presenter, visible in a small window in the top right corner, seems to be explaining these concepts, likely emphasizing the role of effective communication in building and maintaining transparency. The overall tone of the video suggests a professional setting, possibly a corporate or organizational training session.
